title: Error 422
description: A small modpack focsuing on the error 422 creepy pasta
body:
This Modpack Feauters the new mod [ERROR 422](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/err422) as its main mod, alongside some Quality of Life mods

## ERROR 422

If you aren't already familiar with the mod, here's a quick summary,

*   The mod will make your stats be unreadable (hunger-, health-, armorbar)
*   Occasional Glitching in the screen
*   Blocks randomly being replaced with another
*   Loud noises
*   Jump scares

and lots more
